title: STOP Using Claude to Code. Do THIS Instead.
summary: Austin Marchese argues that Claude Code should not be used primarily for coding, but instead as a foundation for building a personal AI operating system that learns user workflows and improves over time. He positions this as owning AI systems rather than renting them, and frames it as a path to building scalable AI-augmented operations for individuals and teams.
